title: WOS API Bundle
description: Public API resource schema for case-export bundles. The bundle ITSELF is a Trellis-emitted CBOR archive (`trellis-export/1`; Trellis Core §18 export package layout, ADR 0007 certificate-of-completion composition). This schema defines the metadata + download seam: clients enumerate available bundles, kick off bundle builds, and download the authoritative byte stream. Bundles are derived projections of canonical Trellis events; they are not themselves authoritative — verification runs against the byte stream's COSE_Sign1 signatures and Merkle proofs (Trellis Core §19). Per ADR 0082 D-15 step 6, bundles complete the case-export surface alongside the cross-case `audit` query schema.

BundleStatus.description: Closed lifecycle status for a bundle build. `pending` = queued, build not started; `building` = generator running, bytes not yet sealed; `available` = byte stream sealed and downloadable; `expired` = retention window elapsed, bytes purged but metadata retained for audit; `failed` = build terminated with error. Closed enum with no extension seam — new states require a schema major bump.

BundleTierInclusion.description: Closed tier-inclusion taxonomy for the bundle's provenance projection (ADR 0082 D-12 closed-with-vendor-extension). `facts-only` = Facts-tier records only (Kernel S8); `facts-reasoning` = Facts + Reasoning (Governance S6.2); `full-tier-set` = all four tiers including Counterfactual (Governance S6.4) and Narrative (AI Integration S13). The kernel/governance/AI tier semantics are mirrored from `provenance.schema.json` — bundles compose, they do not redefine.

BundleMediaType.description: Closed MIME type for the bundle byte stream. Phase 1 ships a single Trellis CBOR export format (`trellis-export/1`; Trellis Core §18.3 `ExportManifestPayload.format`). Future formats register here under a major schema bump rather than a vendor extension — bundle byte format is normative.

Bundle.description: Bundle metadata resource. Describes a single case-export bundle: identity, the case it exports, when it was sealed, and the digest a verifier uses to confirm byte-stream integrity. The actual archive bytes are downloaded out-of-band via `GET /api/v1/bundles/{urn}/download` and are NOT inlined here — JSON cannot represent Trellis CBOR.

id.description: Stable public URN for this bundle. The entity-type segment MUST be `bundle`.

processId.description: Workflow process URN this bundle exports. The entity-type segment MUST be `instance`. One bundle exports exactly one case; multi-case exports are a separate `audit`-domain concern.

lifecycleStateAtExport.description: Lifecycle state of the case at the moment the bundle was sealed. Captured for audit hygiene — a bundle exported mid-lifecycle is not the same artifact as one sealed at terminal state. Open string keyed against the workflow's lifecycle state catalog (Kernel S4 lifecycle).

exportedAt.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when the bundle byte stream was sealed (status transition `building` -> `available`). Distinct from `requestedAt` — the wait between request and seal can be material on long bundle builds.

requestedAt.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when the bundle build was requested (status `pending`). Omitted when the server does not retain request-time metadata.

expiresAt.description: UTC RFC 3339 expiry timestamp or the literal `never` for retention-indefinite bundles (ADR 0082 D-10 sentinel). After this time the byte stream MAY be purged; metadata is retained, status flips to `expired`.

tierInclusion.description: Which provenance tier set is materialized in the byte stream. Picked at request time and recorded here so a verifier can detect mismatch between requested and sealed projections.

mediaType.description: MIME type of the byte stream returned by the download endpoint.

byteSize.description: Size of the sealed byte stream in bytes. Omitted while `status in {pending, building}` because the size is not yet stable. REQUIRED when `status == available`.

certificateOfCompletionDigest.description: Lowercase SHA-256 hex digest of the Trellis certificate-of-completion presentation artifact bound by this bundle (Trellis ADR 0007 `presentation_artifact.content_hash`, computed under domain tag `trellis-presentation-artifact-v1`). Omitted when the case is signing-only / no certificate-of-completion was emitted.

verifierProfile.description: Identifier of the Trellis verifier profile required to validate the byte stream (e.g., suite-id binding, anchor target). Open identifier; semantics live in the deployment's Posture Declaration (Trellis Core §20). Omitted when the deployment exposes a single default profile.

failure.description: Failure detail attached when `status == failed`. Carries a stable WOS error code plus human-readable text drawn from the public registry (`error-registry.md`).

wosErrorCode.description: Stable WOS error code from the public error registry that classifies this failure.

BundleListOptions.description: Query fields for `GET /api/v1/bundles` (ADR 0082 D-7 cursor pagination).

processId.description: Optional workflow process URN filter — list bundles for one case.

lifecycleStateAtExport.description: Optional filter on the lifecycle state at export. Useful for `find me all bundles sealed at terminal state` audit queries.

status.description: Optional status filter. Most common filter is `available` for download-ready bundles.

createdAfter.description: Optional UTC RFC 3339 lower bound on `requestedAt`. Bundles requested before this instant are excluded.

cursor.description: Opaque resume token returned by the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

limit.description: Maximum number of bundles requested for this page.

items.description: Bundle metadata items in this page, newest-first by `requestedAt`.

cursor.description: Opaque token for the next page. Omitted when hasMore is false.

hasMore.description: True when another page is available from the server.

BundleCreateRequest.description: Request body for `POST /api/v1/bundles` — kicks off a case-export bundle build. `Idempotency-Key` header is REQUIRED per ADR 0082 D-16 because bundle builds are externally-visible side effects (Trellis events emit, key-registry snapshots, attachment lineage resolution); a repeat request within the retention window returns the original `Bundle` resource unchanged.

processId.description: Workflow process URN to export. The entity-type segment MUST be `instance`. The caller MUST have visibility into the instance under the current scope (ADR 0068 D-2).

tierFilter.description: Optional tier-inclusion projection. Defaults to `full-tier-set` when omitted. The chosen value is recorded on the resulting `Bundle.tierInclusion` so a verifier can detect projection mismatch.

verifierProfile.description: Optional verifier-profile identifier (Trellis Core §20). When omitted, the deployment's default profile is used. Open identifier whose semantics live in the deployment's Posture Declaration.
